title: Dog Bowl With Pet Food Scoop Feeding Bowls For Dogs Cats Rabbit Hamster Puppies Coloured Transparent Plastic Main Section With Non Slip Rubber Ring Around Base (1 Bowl And 1 Scoop Set) (Pink)
features: DURABLE MATERIAL: Dog Bowl And Pet Food Scoop Is Made Of Durable And High Quality Plastic That Is Resistant To Breakage And Scratching Non Slip Pet Bowl Is Designed To Be Sturdy And Long Lasting Ensuring That It Can Withstand The Daily Use Of Your Dog Pet Food Bowl Is A Paw Some Choice For Keeping Your Hairy Friend Happy Dog Bowl Is Well Made Easy To Clean And Dishwasher Safe

PACKAGE INCLUDES: This Package Provides You With 1 Dog Bowl And 1 Pet Food Scoop You Will Get The Dog Food Bowl And Pet Food Scoop In Same Color Fashionable Pet Food Scoops Are Made Of A Strong Plastic It Is Ideal For Scooping Food Into Pet Dishes Transparent Design Of Pet Bowls Allows You To Easily See The Food Or Water Level So You Can Avoid Overfeeding Or Underfeeding Your Dog Pet Food Bowl For Dogs Has Excellent Value For Money

DOG BOWL: Pet Food Bowls Have A Diameter Of 18.5cm Making It Suitable For Small To Medium Sized Dogs Each Pet Feeding Bowl Has A Colourful Transparent Main Part And A Non Slip Rubber Ring Around The Base Non Slip Base Ensures That The Bowl Stays In Place During Mealtime Pet Bowls Will Not Slip Or Slide Around While Your Dog Is Eating Or Drinking

PERFECT FOR: Pet Feeding Bowl Is A Handy Accessory For Your Furry Friend Pet Bowls For Dogs Are A Great Choice For Providing A Safe Feeding Experience For Your Dog Pet Water Bowl Is A Practical And Convenient Option For Keeping Your Dogs Feeding Area Neat And Organized Pet Food Scoop Is Suitable For Both Wet And Dry Food As Well As Water

WIDE APPLICATIONS: Dog Bowls Can Be Used Not Only For Dogs But Also For Other Small Pets Like Cats Or Rabbits Their Non Slip Base Makes Them Suitable For Use On Various Surfaces Such As Tile Hardwood Or Even Outdoor Areas Whether You Are At Home Travelling Or Enjoying Outdoor Adventures With Your Pet This Versatile Bowl Ensures A Secure And Mess Free Feeding Experience Transparent Pet Bowl Is A Great Choice For Pet Owners Who Are Looking For A Stylish Bowl For Their Pet
